mapper.select: SELECT provider FROM user_social WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY provider
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_social WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_social WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_resume_detail ( user_id, education_json, career_json, certificate_json, language_json, award_json, activity_json, skill_json, portfolio_json, desired_condition_json ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{educationJson}, #{careerJson}, #{certificateJson}, #{languageJson}, #{awardJson}, #{activityJson}, #{skillJson}, #{portfolioJson}, #{desiredConditionJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE education_json = VALUES(education_json), career_json = VALUES(career_json), certificate_json = VALUES(certificate_json), language_json = VALUES(language_json), award_json = VALUES(award_json), activity_json = VALUES(activity_json), skill_json = VALUES(skill_json), portfolio_json = VALUES(portfolio_json), desired_condition_json = VALUES(desired_condition_json), updated_at = NOW()
